paper_title: Palaeontological Study of Mollusca in Tierra del Fuego

methods.description: Process for collecting small taxa and juvenile mollusca specimens from marine deposits at specified localities.

steps.description: Small specimens were recovered from the marine deposits using a bulk sampler operated by hand.
steps.searchable_summary: collect small mollusca specimens using a hand-operated bulk sampler

methods.description: Procedure for processing sediment samples to isolate and sort mollusca specimens.

steps.description: The total volume of sediment was sieved on a 0.5 mm mesh size.
steps.searchable_summary: sieve sediment samples using a 0.5 mm mesh

steps.description: The material retained was sorted manually under a binocular microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: manually sort retained material under a microscope

methods.description: Systematic identification and taxonomic revision of collected mollusca specimens based on previous and recent studies.

steps.description: The systematics is based on previous identification carried out by Gordillo (1992), but recent taxonomic revisions on living mollusca by Linse (1999a), Ponder and Worsfold (1994) and Reid and Osorio (2000), among others, are also taken into account.
steps.searchable_summary: perform taxonomic analysis using previous and recent studies

methods.method_name: Comparative Analysis with Antarctic and Buenos Aires Records
methods.description: Comparison of collected mollusca specimens with fossil records from Antarctica and Quaternary deposits in Buenos Aires.

steps.description: Comparison with Quaternary mollusca from the Antarctic was made on the basis of available fossil records from Tierra del Fuego and records from different localities around Antarctica.
steps.searchable_summary: compare specimens with Antarctic fossil records

steps.description: Information on mollusca from Quaternary deposits in the Buenos Aires province was used for a broader scale comparison.
steps.searchable_summary: compare specimens with Buenos Aires Quaternary deposits
